# nomad_acl_policy (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_acl_policy" "my_policy" {
  name = "my-policy"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rules` (String) ACL Rules in HCL format
